eventInfo:
Experience the rolling terrain and shaded canopies of Lake McMurtry's finest trails. Test your endurance in one of Oklahoma's most scenic, highly-runnable trail races.

Location: Lake McMurtry, East Rec Area
Start Times: 50K 7:00 AM | 25K 8:00 AM

accordions.title: Registration Pricing
accordions.content:
DistanceUntil Jan 1Until Mar 1Race Day
50K$75$90$105
25K$55$70$85

accordions.title: Aid Stations & Cutoffs
accordions.content:
We are a cupless race. Please bring a reusable flask. Aid stations will be stocked with water, electrolytes, gels, and salty snacks.

  • Aid 1 (Mile 4.5): Water & Gels
  • Aid 2 (Mile 9.0): Full Aid (Cutoff: 10:30 AM)
  • Aid 3 (Mile 13.1): Water Only

accordions.title: Drop Bags & Crew
accordions.content: 50K runners may leave one drop bag at the Start/Finish line, accessible at the halfway point (Mile 15.5). Crews are only allowed at the Start/Finish area.

accordions.title: Awards & Swag
accordions.content: All finishers receive a custom wood medallion. Podium awards go to the top 3 Male/Female in both distances.
